testcase.name: test_redeem_unavailable
testcase.failure:
/root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:1116: in json return complexjson.loads(self.text, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/__init__.py:346: in loads return _default_decoder.decode(s) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:337: in decode obj, end = self.raw_decode(s, idx=_w(s, 0).end()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:355: in raw_decode raise JSONDecodeError("Expecting value", s, err.value) from None E json.decoder.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: backend/tests/test_admin_flows.py:256: in test_redeem_unavailable u = v.json()["user"] ^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:1120: in json raise RequestsJSONDecodeError(e.msg, e.doc, e.pos) E requests.exceptions.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)

testcase.name: test_search_by_full_phone
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_admin_flows.py:279: in test_search_by_full_phone assert r.status_code == 200 E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_create_staff

failure.message: AssertionError: Staff create failed: 500 Internal Server Error assert 500 == 200 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_admin_flows.py:344: in test_create_staff assert r.status_code == 200, f"Staff create failed: {r.status_code} {r.text}" E AssertionError: Staff create failed: 500 Internal Server Error E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
